system.flavor: You bend a character's timeline, reversing causality so that the very ground warps under their feet.
system.effect:
Mark a character in range. While marked, note their starting position at the start of their turn. At the end of their turn, if they are in range 1-3 of their position, you may teleport that character to their starting position, or as close a possible if the space is occupied. Then, remove the mark. Otherwise, keep the mark.
Overdrive for original position in range 1-6
